title: Unlimited Memory: How to Use Advanced Learning Strategies to Learn Faster, Remember More and Be More Productive
subtitle: A speed-oriented memory improvement system based on visualization, association, and concentration.
author: Kevin Horsley
themes: Concentration as the foundation of memory
The link method for connecting ideas
The PEG system for memorizing lists
Speed reading and accelerated learning integration
excerpt: World Memory Championship medalist Kevin Horsley reveals the memory techniques that enable him to memorize 50,000 digits of pi, a deck of cards in under 30 seconds, and hundreds of random words in order. This compact book focuses on the core skills — concentration, visualization, and association — that power all memory feats, with practical applications for learning, productivity, and daily life.
